mapper.select: select stat_id as statId, stat_date as statDate, total_visits as totalVisits, article_views as articleViews, product_views as productViews, unique_visitors as uniqueVisitors, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from portal_visit_statistics where stat_date = #{statDate} limit 1

select stat_date as statDate, date_format(stat_date, '%m-%d') as dateLabel, total_visits as totalVisits, article_views as articleViews, product_views as productViews, unique_visitors as uniqueVisitors from portal_visit_statistics where stat_date <= curdate() order by stat_date desc limit #{days}
select coalesce(sum(view_count), 0) from portal_article where status = '1' and del_flag = '0' and date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m') = date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m')
select coalesce(count(*), 0) from portal_visit_log where page_type = 'product' and del_flag = '0' and visit_date >= date_format(date_sub(now(), interval 1 month), '%Y-%m-01')
select count(*) from portal_message where handle_status in ('0', '1') and del_flag = '0'
select count(*) from portal_article where status = '1' and del_flag = '0'
select count(*) from portal_product where status = '1' and del_flag = '0'
select count(*) from portal_customer where del_flag = '0'
